name: SCHOLASTIC CORP
summary: Part I Item 1 | Business Overview Scholastic Corporation (the Corporation and together with its subsidiaries, Scholastic or the Company) is the worlds largest publisher and distributor of childrens books, a leading provider of print and digital instructional materials for grades pre-kindergarten ("pre-K") to grade 12 and a producer of entertaining literary and educational childrens media.
